A

addTableQuery(String, String) - Method in class com.marklogic.spring.batch.item.rdbms.AllTablesItemReader
Register a custom SQL query for selecting data from the given table name.
AllTablesItemReader - Class in com.marklogic.spring.batch.item.rdbms
Spring Batch Reader that first queries for all the table names from the given DataSource, and then reads rows from every table.
AllTablesItemReader(DataSource) - Constructor for class com.marklogic.spring.batch.item.rdbms.AllTablesItemReader
 
AllTablesItemReader(DataSource, String) - Constructor for class com.marklogic.spring.batch.item.rdbms.AllTablesItemReader

buildTableReader(String, ExecutionContext) - Method in class com.marklogic.spring.batch.item.rdbms.AllTablesItemReader

D

DEFAULT_TABLE_NAME_KEY - Static variable in class com.marklogic.spring.batch.item.rdbms.AllTablesItemReader
 

G

getSqlQueryForTable(String) - Method in class com.marklogic.spring.batch.item.rdbms.AllTablesItemReader
Uses the tableQueries property to see if there's a custom SQL query for the given table name.
getTableNames() - Method in class com.marklogic.spring.batch.item.rdbms.AllTablesItemReader
 

L

logger - Variable in class com.marklogic.spring.batch.item.rdbms.AllTablesItemReader
 

O

open(ExecutionContext) - Method in class com.marklogic.spring.batch.item.rdbms.AllTablesItemReader
Use the DataSource to get a list of all the tables.

R

read() - Method in class com.marklogic.spring.batch.item.rdbms.AllTablesItemReader
Reads a row from the active JdbcCursorItemReader.
